_comment: Ledger of feedback submissions that have already been processed. Every row in the JGM readback should appear here so we don't act on it twice. Status is 'applied' (we made a change to the question bank) or 'ignored_duplicate' (the row reports a problem that was already fixed in an earlier commit; the user's PWA cache made them re-report it).

processed.note: Already addressed in c5b1ce5 (CPSU banning clarification). Re-reported because the user's installed PWA was running a cached pre-c5b1ce5 build.
Already addressed in c5b1ce5 (Fish article citation + explanation clause). Re-reported from cached PWA.
Already addressed in c5b1ce5 (Ukraine PR distractor). Re-reported from cached PWA.
Already addressed in c5b1ce5 (chronology fix on the 2004 order distractor). Re-reported from cached PWA.
Difficulty raised easy -> medium per JGM.
Replaced the 'merge with Russia to resist Moscow' distractor with a currency-policy distractor (Ukraine kept the ruble until after independence).
Difficulty raised easy -> medium per JGM.

Replaced the two 'restore/relegalize communism' distractors (which were trivially wrong for a decommunization question) with lustration-vs-decommunization, monument-removal-implementation, and Victory-Day-rescheduling distractors that are plausibly confusable with the real provisions.
